title: Exchange
description: Schema for a single cryptocurrency exchange entry in the BitsARK Exchanges API.

id.description: Unique slug-style identifier for the exchange.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the exchange.

slug.description: URL-safe slug for the exchange (should match id).

website.description: Official website URL of the exchange.

logo_url.description: URL of the exchange logo image.

brazil_registered.description: Whether the exchange is registered as a legal entity in Brazil.

oneOf.description: Brazilian CNPJ registration number in format 00.000.000/0000-00.
Null when the exchange is not registered in Brazil.

bcb_licensed.description: Whether the exchange holds a license issued by Banco Central do Brasil (BCB).

accepts_pix.description: Whether the exchange accepts deposits or withdrawals via Pix (Brazilian instant payment system).

fee_url.description: Direct URL to the exchange's official fee schedule page.

note.description: Human-readable note about fees, discounts, or special conditions.

monitored_by_dolarmap.description: Whether this exchange is actively monitored by the DolarMap service.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this entry was last manually verified.
